prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T4 work setting, the evaluated element is A-402 A/C service within 2.9 Automotive & Powertrain. The relevant subcategory is 2.9.4 EV & A/C Systems. The observed field condition is: sealed with stop-leak before service (TRD). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors EPA 609, OEM specs. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T4 A-402 Measurement & estimation
